visual_description: Two men in light-colored shirts are seated indoors, one holding a small cup while the other looks down, with a wall of framed photos visible behind them. The man holding the cup is slightly turned, gazing toward his companion, while the other remains focused downward. Both appear seated at a table, with the background slightly out of focus.
audio_description: The audio features a male voice with a neutral tone, speaking at a moderate pace and pitch, with no noticeable prosody or background noise.
